channel.title: Truth as Process on Gold, Velvet and Ashes
channel.description: Recent content in Truth as Process on Gold, Velvet and Ashes

item.title: Truth as Process
item.description: An essay arguing that the halting problem’s paradox is partly a self-imposed constraint: demanding a point answer to a line-shaped process. It proposes treating truth as something that can be conferred by an evolving process rather than a single atomic verdict.
